title: BitNet-TT session 10: Phase 2 — manual SDPA + Phase 2 closure

stories.title: Manual SDPA helper
stories.notes: DONE. _manual_sdpa in attention.py, gated on BITNET_MANUAL_SDPA env.

stories.title: Measure PCC + tps
stories.notes: DONE. PCC 0.980266 (delta -0.0018 vs baseline 0.982032), p50 11.5 ms (no regression). Manual primitive SDPA regresses vs fused kernel.

stories.title: Re-run per-op RFE
stories.notes: SKIPPED — PCC delta already decisive (negative). Re-running localization would confirm the direction but not change the conclusion. All cheap levers exhausted.

stories.title: Commit + decide next step
stories.notes: DONE. Committed at 61a3644. Phase 2 closure doc at docs/session_10_phase2_closure.md. Cheap-lever scope fully exhausted — 5 levers tested, all noise or regressions. Next would be multi-week tt-metal op-library audit (plan v4 Phase 3-4 scope), requires explicit user go-ahead. Session 10 cancels with that handoff.

phase_2_verdict: Cheap-lever scope fully exhausted. Five targeted interventions (fp32 RMSNorm, fp32 residual, SDPA HiFi4, manual RoPE, manual SDPA) all fail to move PCC by an actionable amount. Drift is structurally distributed across tt-metal's bf16 op library, not localized in one op.
